problem id: 68614b78
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  01111101 -> 10111011
  10010110 -> 10011101
  01111100 -> 10010011
  00100100 -> 01011011
  11011101 -> 10101110
  11001101 -> 00101110
  10110111 -> 10110101
  10101010 -> 11111111

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 00001110
